---
title: "Predictive Modeling of Mouse Classes Using Protein Expression Data"
output: html_notebook
---

Install Packages 
```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#Libraries
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)
library(ggplot2)
library(corrplot)
library(naniar)   # for missing value visualizations
library(here)
library(caret)
library(randomForest)
library(gbm)
library(nnet)
library(earth)
library(pROC)
library(VIM)
library(knitr)
```

EDA and Pre-Processing
```{r}

#Preprocessing
#Load File

#James Directory:  df <- read_excel("/Users/jamesshoenhair/Documents/ADS503FinalProject_Mice_Protein_Expression/Data_Cortex_Nuclear.xls")
#df <- read_excel("Data_Cortex_Nuclear.xls") #Veronica Directory
# Stephanie
df <- read_excel("/Users/stjsm/OneDrive/Desktop/ADS-503/Final Project/Data_Cortex_Nuclear.xls")

dim(df)          # 1080 rows, 82 columns
head(df)
str(df)

#initial Summary Statistics

summary(df)
skim(df) 

#Check for Null Values
colSums(is.na(df))

df %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "column", values_to = "missing") %>%
  filter(missing > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(missing))

#Handling Null Values Through Imputation

df_imputed <- df %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ifelse(is.na(.), median(., na.rm = TRUE), .)))

```

EDA and Pre-processing
```{r}
#Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA)
#Updated Summary Statistics
skim(df)

#Dat set Class Distributions
df %>%
  count(class) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = class, y = n, fill = class)) +
  geom_col() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Sample Count by Class")

#Genotype/Treatment/Behavior

table(df$Genotype)
table(df$Treatment)
table(df$Behavior)

#Protein Expression Distributions

df %>%
  select(DYRK1A_N, BDNF_N, APP_N, Tau_N) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything()) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = value, fill = name)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, show.legend = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~name, scales = "free") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Protein Expression Distributions")

#Correlation Heatmap
  
numeric_cols <- df %>% select(where(is.numeric))
corrplot(cor(numeric_cols, use = "complete.obs"),
         method = "color", tl.cex = 0.4, order = "hclust")

```
KNN Imputation 
```{r}
# Perform KNN imputation as new data set
knn_imputed <- kNN(df, imp_var = FALSE)

# Compare Variable Correlations Between KNN and Median Imputation
numeric_med <- df_imputed[, sapply(df_imputed, is.numeric)]
cor_med <- cor(
  numeric_med,
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)
cor_med <- as.data.frame(round(cor_med, 2))
knitr::kable(cor_med) # Median Imputation Correlation table
numeric_knn <- knn_imputed[, sapply(knn_imputed, is.numeric)]
cor_knn <- cor(
  numeric_knn,
  use = "pairwise.complete.obs"
)
cor_knn <- as.data.frame(round(cor_knn, 2))
knitr::kable(cor_knn) # KNN Imputation correlation table

# Slight differences in correlations: both methods can be inputted into models -> choose imputation method with best predictive outcome
```
Feature Selection 
```{r}
# Separate Predictors and Target for both datasets
y_knn <- knn_imputed$class
x_knn <- knn_imputed[, names(knn_imputed) != "class"]
y_med <- df_imputed$class
x_med <- df_imputed[, names(df_imputed) != "class"]

# Remove Mouse ID (not valuable)
x_knn <- x_knn[, names(x_knn) != "MouseID"]
x_med <- x_med[, names(x_med) != "MouseID"]

# Remove Genotype, Treatment, and Behavior (These are used to define the classes which are combinations of all three targets)
x_med <- x_med[, !(names(x_med) %in% c("Genotype", "Treatment", "Behavior"))]
x_knn <- x_knn[, !(names(x_knn) %in% c("Genotype", "Treatment", "Behavior"))]

# Validate DataTypes (make sure all are numeric)
str(x_knn)
str(x_med)

# Identify Near-Zero Variance Predictors
nzv_knn <- nearZeroVar(x_knn)
nzv_med <- nearZeroVar(x_med)
length(nzv_knn)
length(nzv_med) # There are no NZV predictors

# Identify and remove High Correlations 
cor_mat <- cor(x_med)
cor_mat_knn <- cor(x_knn)
high_med <- findCorrelation(cor_mat, cutoff = 0.90) # removes variables until all pair-wise correlations are below |0.9|
high_knn <- findCorrelation(cor_mat_knn, cutoff = 0.90)
x_knn <- x_knn[, -high_knn]
x_med <- x_med[, -high_med]
length(x_knn)
length(x_med) # Reduced from 77 to 71

```

Cross-Validation/Test Train Split 
```{r}
# ---- Targets (pulled from the cleaned data the team built) ----
y_med <- factor(make.names(as.character(df_imputed$class)))
y_knn <- factor(make.names(as.character(knn_imputed$class)))

# ---- Remove label-defining columns to prevent leakage ----
# Genotype/Treatment/Behavior literally define the 8 class labels,
# so we predict from the protein features only.
drop_pattern <- "Genotype|Treatment|Behavior"
x_med <- x_med[, !grepl(drop_pattern, names(x_med))]
x_knn <- x_knn[, !grepl(drop_pattern, names(x_knn))]

# ---- Shared stratified 80/20 split (same rows for both versions) ----
set.seed(503)
train_idx <- createDataPartition(y_med, p = 0.80, list = FALSE)

xtr_med <- x_med[train_idx, ];  ytr_med <- y_med[train_idx]
xte_med <- x_med[-train_idx, ]; yte_med <- y_med[-train_idx]
xtr_knn <- x_knn[train_idx, ];  ytr_knn <- y_knn[train_idx]
xte_knn <- x_knn[-train_idx, ]; yte_knn <- y_knn[-train_idx]

# ---- Shared 5-fold CV control (class probs on, for ROC later) ----
ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "cv",
  number = 5,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = multiClassSummary,
  savePredictions = "final"
)

cat("Predictors after leakage removal:", ncol(x_med), "\n")
cat("Train rows:", nrow(xtr_med), "| Test rows:", nrow(xte_med), "\n")
```


Penalized Regression Models: Ridge, Lasso, & Elastic Net 
```{r warning=FALSE}

# Train Ridge, Lasso, Elastic Net on a given training set
fit_penalized <- function(xtr, ytr) {
  ridge <- train(x = xtr, y = ytr, method = "glmnet", metric = "Accuracy",
    trControl = ctrl, preProcess = c("center","scale"),
    tuneGrid = expand.grid(alpha = 0, lambda = 10^seq(-4, 1, length = 30)))

  lasso <- train(x = xtr, y = ytr, method = "glmnet", metric = "Accuracy",
    trControl = ctrl, preProcess = c("center","scale"),
    tuneGrid = expand.grid(alpha = 1, lambda = 10^seq(-4, 1, length = 30)))

  enet <- train(x = xtr, y = ytr, method = "glmnet", metric = "Accuracy",
    trControl = ctrl, preProcess = c("center","scale"),
    tuneGrid = expand.grid(alpha = seq(0.1, 0.9, by = 0.2),
                           lambda = 10^seq(-4, 1, length = 20)))

  list(Ridge = ridge, Lasso = lasso, ElasticNet = enet)
}

set.seed(503)
models_med <- fit_penalized(xtr_med, ytr_med)
models_knn <- fit_penalized(xtr_knn, ytr_knn)

# Evaluate on held-out test set -> tidy metrics row
eval_model <- function(model, xte, yte, name, impute) {
  pred  <- predict(model, xte)
  probs <- predict(model, xte, type = "prob")
  acc   <- mean(pred == yte)
  auc   <- as.numeric(multiclass.roc(yte, as.matrix(probs))$auc)
  data.frame(Model = name, Imputation = impute,
             Accuracy = round(acc, 4), AUC = round(auc, 4))
}

results_penalized <- rbind(
  eval_model(models_med$Ridge,      xte_med, yte_med, "Ridge",       "Median"),
  eval_model(models_med$Lasso,      xte_med, yte_med, "Lasso",       "Median"),
  eval_model(models_med$ElasticNet, xte_med, yte_med, "Elastic Net", "Median"),
  eval_model(models_knn$Ridge,      xte_knn, yte_knn, "Ridge",       "KNN"),
  eval_model(models_knn$Lasso,      xte_knn, yte_knn, "Lasso",       "KNN"),
  eval_model(models_knn$ElasticNet, xte_knn, yte_knn, "Elastic Net", "KNN")
)

print(results_penalized)

best <- results_penalized[which.max(results_penalized$Accuracy), ]
cat("\nBest penalized model:", best$Model, "on", best$Imputation,
    "imputation | Accuracy =", best$Accuracy, "| AUC =", best$AUC, "\n")
```
Tree-Based Models: Random Forest & Gradient Boosting 
```{r}

# Random Forest Models
set.seed(503)

rf_grid <- expand.grid(mtry = c(2, 4, 8, 16))

rf_med <- train(
  x = xtr_med,
  y = ytr_med,
  method = "rf",
  metric = "Accuracy",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = rf_grid,
  ntree = 1000,
  importance = TRUE
)

rf_knn <- train(
  x = xtr_knn,
  y = ytr_knn,
  method = "rf",
  metric = "Accuracy",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = rf_grid,
  ntree = 1000,
  importance = TRUE
)

# Predictions
rf_pred_med <- predict(rf_med, xte_med)
rf_pred_knn <- predict(rf_knn, xte_knn)

rf_prob_med <- predict(rf_med, xte_med, type = "prob")
rf_prob_knn <- predict(rf_knn, xte_knn, type = "prob")

# Accuracy
mean(rf_pred_med == yte_med)
mean(rf_pred_knn == yte_knn)

# Confusion matrices
confusionMatrix(rf_pred_med, yte_med)
confusionMatrix(rf_pred_knn, yte_knn)

# Multiclass AUC
rf_auc_med <- multiclass.roc(yte_med, as.matrix(rf_prob_med))$auc
rf_auc_knn <- multiclass.roc(yte_knn, as.matrix(rf_prob_knn))$auc

rf_auc_med
rf_auc_knn

# Variable importance
varImpPlot(rf_med$finalModel, n.var = 15,
           main = "Top 15 RF Variable Importance - Median Imputation")
varImpPlot(rf_knn$finalModel, n.var = 15,
           main = "Top 15 RF Variable Importance - KNN Imputation")

rf_med$bestTune
rf_knn$bestTune

#Gradient Boosting
set.seed(503)

gbm_grid <- expand.grid(
  interaction.depth = c(1, 3),
  n.trees = c(100, 500),
  shrinkage = c(0.01, 0.05, 0.1),
  n.minobsinnode = 10
)

gbm_med <- train(
  x = xtr_med,
  y = ytr_med,
  method = "gbm",
  metric = "Accuracy",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = gbm_grid,
  verbose = FALSE
)

gbm_knn <- train(
  x = xtr_knn,
  y = ytr_knn,
  method = "gbm",
  metric = "Accuracy",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = gbm_grid,
  verbose = FALSE
)

gbm_med
gbm_knn

# Predictions
gbm_pred_med <- predict(gbm_med, xte_med)
gbm_pred_knn <- predict(gbm_knn, xte_knn)

gbm_prob_med <- predict(gbm_med, xte_med, type = "prob")
gbm_prob_knn <- predict(gbm_knn, xte_knn, type = "prob")

# Accuracy
mean(gbm_pred_med == yte_med)
mean(gbm_pred_knn == yte_knn)

# Confusion matrices
confusionMatrix(gbm_pred_med, yte_med)
confusionMatrix(gbm_pred_knn, yte_knn)





```
Logistic Regression & MARS 
```{r}

## MARS
# Additional Pre-processing needed:
# Combine X and Y Train into one dataset
train_med_mars <- cbind(xtr_med, class = ytr_med)
train_knn_mars <- cbind(xtr_knn, class = ytr_knn)

# Fit MARS into training data
mars_med <- earth(class ~ ., data = train_med_mars)
mars_knn <- earth(class ~ ., data = train_knn_mars)

# Predict test classes with fitted MARS model
mars_med <- earth(class ~ ., data = train_med_mars)
mars_knn <- earth(class ~ ., data = train_knn_mars)

# Get evaluation metrics

mars_pred_med <- predict(mars_med, newdata = xte_med, type = "class")
mars_pred_knn <- predict(mars_knn, newdata = xte_knn, type = "class")

mars_pred_med <- factor(mars_pred_med, levels = levels(yte_med))
mars_pred_knn <- factor(mars_pred_knn, levels = levels(yte_knn))

mean(mars_pred_med == yte_med)
mean(mars_pred_knn == yte_knn)

#AUC
mars_prob_med <- as.data.frame(predict(mars_med, newdata = xte_med, type = "response"))
mars_prob_knn <- as.data.frame(predict(mars_knn, newdata = xte_knn, type = "response"))

# STILL NEED TO GET AUC AND OTHER METRICS FOR BOTH MODELS

## LOGISTIC REGRESSION
# Additional Pre-processing Needed:
# Learn means and standard deviations from training data only
pp_med <- preProcess(xtr_med, method = c("center", "scale"))
pp_knn <- preProcess(xtr_knn, method = c("center", "scale"))

# Apply to training data
xtr_med_scaled <- predict(pp_med, xtr_med)
xtr_knn_scaled <- predict(pp_knn, xtr_knn)

# Apply to test data
xts_med_scaled <- predict(pp_med, xte_med)
xts_knn_scaled <- predict(pp_knn, xte_knn)

# Combine X and Y Train into one dataset
train_med_lr <- cbind(xtr_med_scaled, class = ytr_med)
train_knn_lr <- cbind(xtr_knn_scaled, class = ytr_knn)

# Make sure it matches the original training set size
nrow(train_med_lr)
nrow(train_knn_lr)

# Make sure class is factored
train_med_lr$class <- as.factor(train_med_lr$class)
train_knn_lr$class <- as.factor(train_knn_lr$class)

# Fit Multinomial Logistic Regression Model on Training Data
lrmodel_med <- multinom(class ~ ., data = train_med_lr) # final loss is very low, converged
lrmodel_knn <- multinom(class ~ ., data = train_knn_lr) # final loss is very low, converged

# Test the Model on Test Data
log_prob_med <- predict(lrmodel_med, newdata = xts_med_scaled)
log_prob_knn <- predict(lrmodel_knn, newdata = xts_knn_scaled)

# Class probabilities
log_prob_med <- predict(lrmodel_med,newdata = xts_med_scaled,type = "probs")

log_prob_knn <- predict(lrmodel_knn,newdata = xts_knn_scaled,type = "probs")

# Predicted classes
log_pred_med <- predict(lrmodel_med, newdata = xts_med_scaled, type = "class")
log_pred_knn <- predict(lrmodel_knn, newdata = xts_knn_scaled, type = "class")

# Match factor levels to test outcome
log_pred_med <- factor(log_pred_med, levels = levels(yte_med))
log_pred_knn <- factor(log_pred_knn, levels = levels(yte_knn))

log_prob_med <- as.data.frame(log_prob_med)
log_prob_knn <- as.data.frame(log_prob_knn)


# Evaluate Results of Logistic Regression
print("Logistic Regression Model Results using KNN Imputation\n")
mean(log_pred_knn == yte_knn)
table(log_pred_knn, yte_knn)# Accuracy is slightly higher using KNN
print("Logistic Regression Model Results using Median Imputation\n")
mean(log_pred_med == yte_med)
table(log_pred_med, yte_med)

```
Evaluation Comparison Table
```{r}

# get results
ridge_pred_med <- predict(models_med$Ridge, xte_med)
ridge_prob_med <- predict(models_med$Ridge, xte_med, type = "prob")

ridge_pred_knn <- predict(models_knn$Ridge, xte_knn)
ridge_prob_knn <- predict(models_knn$Ridge, xte_knn, type = "prob")

lasso_pred_med <- predict(models_med$Lasso, xte_med)
lasso_prob_med <- predict(models_med$Lasso, xte_med, type = "prob")

lasso_pred_knn <- predict(models_knn$Lasso, xte_knn)
lasso_prob_knn <- predict(models_knn$Lasso, xte_knn, type = "prob")

enet_pred_med <- predict(models_med$ElasticNet, xte_med)
enet_prob_med <- predict(models_med$ElasticNet, xte_med, type = "prob")

enet_pred_knn <- predict(models_knn$ElasticNet, xte_knn)
enet_prob_knn <- predict(models_knn$ElasticNet, xte_knn, type = "prob")

# Evaluation Comparison Table

get_metrics <- function(model, pred, prob, truth, imp){

  data.frame(
    Model = model,
    Imputation = imp,
    Accuracy = confusionMatrix(pred, truth)$overall["Accuracy"],
    Kappa = confusionMatrix(pred, truth)$overall["Kappa"],
    AUC = as.numeric(multiclass.roc(truth, as.matrix(prob))$auc)
  )
}

results <- bind_rows(

  get_metrics("Ridge", ridge_pred_med, ridge_prob_med, yte_med, "Median"),
  get_metrics("Ridge", ridge_pred_knn, ridge_prob_knn, yte_knn, "KNN"),

  get_metrics("Lasso", lasso_pred_med, lasso_prob_med, yte_med, "Median"),
  get_metrics("Lasso", lasso_pred_knn, lasso_prob_knn, yte_knn, "KNN"),

  get_metrics("Elastic Net", enet_pred_med, enet_prob_med, yte_med, "Median"),
  get_metrics("Elastic Net", enet_pred_knn, enet_prob_knn, yte_knn, "KNN"),

  get_metrics("Logistic Regression", log_pred_med, log_prob_med, yte_med, "Median"),
  get_metrics("Logistic Regression", log_pred_knn, log_prob_knn, yte_knn, "KNN"),

  get_metrics("Random Forest", rf_pred_med, rf_prob_med, yte_med, "Median"),
  get_metrics("Random Forest", rf_pred_knn, rf_prob_knn, yte_knn, "KNN"),

  get_metrics("Gradient Boosting", gbm_pred_med, gbm_prob_med, yte_med, "Median"),
  get_metrics("Gradient Boosting", gbm_pred_knn, gbm_prob_knn, yte_knn, "KNN"),
  
  get_metrics("MARS", mars_pred_med, mars_prob_med, yte_med, "Median"),
  get_metrics("MARS", mars_pred_knn, mars_prob_knn, yte_knn, "KNN")
)

results %>%
  mutate(
    Accuracy = round(Accuracy, 4),
    Kappa = round(Kappa, 4),
    AUC = round(AUC, 4)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Accuracy), desc(AUC)) %>%
  kable(caption = "Performance Comparison of Classification Models")
```
AUC-ROC Plot 
```{r}

target_class <- "c.CS.m"

plot(
  roc(ifelse(yte_med == target_class, 1, 0),
      log_prob_med[, target_class]),
  col = "red",
  lwd = 2,
  main = paste("ROC Comparison -", target_class)
)

plot(
  roc(ifelse(yte_med == target_class, 1, 0),
      rf_prob_med[, target_class]),
  add = TRUE,
  col = "black",
  lwd = 2
)

plot(
  roc(ifelse(yte_med == target_class, 1, 0),
      gbm_prob_med[, target_class]),
  add = TRUE,
  col = "darkcyan",
  lwd = 2
)

plot(
  roc(ifelse(yte_med == target_class, 1, 0),
      ridge_prob_med[, target_class]),
  add = TRUE,
  col = "blue",
  lwd = 2
)

plot(
  roc(ifelse(yte_med == target_class, 1, 0),
      lasso_prob_med[, target_class]),
  add = TRUE,
  col = "green",
  lwd = 2
)

plot(
  roc(ifelse(yte_med == target_class, 1, 0),
      enet_prob_med[, target_class]),
  add = TRUE,
  col = "purple",
  lwd = 2
)

legend(
  "bottomright",
  legend = c(
    "Logistic Regression",
    "Random Forest",
    "Gradient Boosting",
    "Ridge",
    "Lasso",
    "Elastic Net"
  ),
  col = c("red", "black", "darkcyan", "blue", "green", "purple"),
  lwd = 2,
  cex = 0.7
)

```
Additional Evaluation Metrics 
```{r}

#CV Performance


get_cv_metrics <- function(model, model_name, imputation) {
  best <- model$bestTune
  
  cv_results <- model$results
  
  for (col in names(best)) {
    cv_results <- cv_results[cv_results[[col]] == best[[col]], ]
  }
  
  data.frame(
    Model = model_name,
    Imputation = imputation,
    CV_Accuracy = cv_results$Accuracy,
    CV_Kappa = cv_results$Kappa,
    CV_LogLoss = ifelse("logLoss" %in% names(cv_results), cv_results$logLoss, NA),
    CV_AUC = ifelse("AUC" %in% names(cv_results), cv_results$AUC, NA)
  )
}

cv_results <- bind_rows(
  get_cv_metrics(models_med$Ridge, "Ridge", "Median"),
  get_cv_metrics(models_knn$Ridge, "Ridge", "KNN"),
  
  get_cv_metrics(models_med$Lasso, "Lasso", "Median"),
  get_cv_metrics(models_knn$Lasso, "Lasso", "KNN"),
  
  get_cv_metrics(models_med$ElasticNet, "Elastic Net", "Median"),
  get_cv_metrics(models_knn$ElasticNet, "Elastic Net", "KNN"),
  
  get_cv_metrics(rf_med, "Random Forest", "Median"),
  get_cv_metrics(rf_knn, "Random Forest", "KNN"),
  
  get_cv_metrics(gbm_med, "Gradient Boosting", "Median"),
  get_cv_metrics(gbm_knn, "Gradient Boosting", "KNN")
)

cv_results %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), round, 4)) %>%
  arrange(desc(CV_Accuracy), CV_LogLoss) %>%
  kable(caption = "Cross-Validated Model Performance")

```
Final Model Coeff. 
```{r}

# Chosen model: Elastic Net with KNN imputation

# Check best tuning parameters
models_knn$ElasticNet$bestTune

# Extract coefficients from final Elastic Net model using best lambda
coef_enet_knn <- coef(
  models_knn$ElasticNet$finalModel,
  s = models_knn$ElasticNet$bestTune$lambda
)

# Function to extract nonzero coefficients from multiclass glmnet model
extract_enet_vars <- function(coef_list, imputation) {
  
  bind_rows(lapply(names(coef_list), function(class_name) {
    
    coef_mat <- as.matrix(coef_list[[class_name]])
    
    data.frame(
      Class = class_name,
      Variable = rownames(coef_mat),
      Coefficient = coef_mat[, 1],
      Imputation = imputation,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })) %>%
    filter(
      Variable != "(Intercept)",
      Coefficient != 0
    ) %>%
    mutate(Abs_Coefficient = abs(Coefficient)) %>%
    arrange(desc(Abs_Coefficient))
}

# Extract all nonzero coefficients
enet_vars_knn <- extract_enet_vars(coef_enet_knn, "KNN")

# View 
enet_vars_knn

# Count how many unique predictors were selected
enet_vars_knn %>%
  distinct(Variable) %>%
  summarise(Number_Selected_Predictors = n())

# Top 20 strongest predictors overall
top_enet_knn <- enet_vars_knn %>%
  group_by(Variable) %>%
  summarise(
    Max_Abs_Coefficient = max(Abs_Coefficient),
    Classes_Selected_For = paste(unique(Class), collapse = ", "),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Max_Abs_Coefficient)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

# View top 20
top_enet_knn

# table
top_enet_knn %>%
  mutate(Max_Abs_Coefficient = round(Max_Abs_Coefficient, 4)) %>%
  kable(
    caption = "Top 20 Elastic Net Predictors Using KNN Imputation"
  )


```
